title: MD
biography: Ronald Ross was a British physician born in India who proved that malaria is transmitted by mosquitoes, one of the most important discoveries in medical history. Nobel Prize 1902.
aiSummary: Ronald Ross is a tropical medicine specialist at Liverpool School of Tropical Medicine. Based in London.
awards: Nobel Prize in Physiology or Medicine (1902)

timeline.title: Proved mosquito transmission of malaria
timeline.description: Demonstrated the complete life cycle of the malaria parasite in Anopheles mosquitoes

timeline.title: Nobel Prize
timeline.description: For his work on malaria transmission
